description: Recto: Legal document. There is a single signature from the scribe Meʾīr Ben-Naʿīm, which he must have included before discarding this document as an unfinished draft. Besides the second witness signature and consenting party signature, there are several other blanks which were never filled in. Location: Cairo. Dated: 5550 (or perhaps 555[.] with the last digit never filled in), which is 1789/90 CE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
